title: arundo collina subsp. hellenica
intro: Arundo collina subsp. hellenica, also known as Hellenic cattail or Greek cattail, is a subspecies of the arundo collina plant, a type of reed-like perennial that belongs to the grass family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of arundo collina subsp. hellenica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional Greek medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
